titleStmt.title: SII 7.363: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 363. (A.R. No. 165 of 1901). ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE HOUSE OF PARAMESVARABHATTA AT THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkya
rāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē(t) . svasti śrī . jayādbhudaya śakavaruṣa 131
7 neya bhāvasaṁvatsarada phālguṇa ba 1 sōmavāradalu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśva
ra Arirāyavibhāḍa bhāṣegetapuvarāyaragaṁḍa Uttara dakṣiṇa pūrvva paścima samudrā
dhipati śrīvīrahariharamahārāyara nirūpadiṁ mallappa Oḍeyaru bārakūra rājyava pra
tipālaneya māḍuva kāladalli maṇigāṟakēriya Oḷagaṇa sōmeyadēvare saṁnidhiyalli du
rggiseṭṭiya maga ḷiyanu badda dharmmadāyada brāhma
ṇabhōjanakke maṭhakke naḍava dharmmada bāḷa vivara pāṁḍēśvaradoḷage tāvu badda brahmādāyada mūla
da bāḷu bayaloḷage mane maneṭhāU maneya bāgila gadde 4 kkaṁ bittuva bedegaṇagilu
mu nāgaṁḍagadalu mūḍe 3 hā 30 keṟeya baḍagaṇa gadde bittuva mu 2 hā 10 dugeya baḷiya ga
dde bittuva mu 1 hā 30 muttina koraviyū yū kūḍi bittuva mu 1 hā 30 dē
vara gadde koravi sahita bittuva mu 3 hā 30 hegeṟeya gade bittuva mu 2 hā 30 ya tāṟu bi
ttuva ha 15 A(ṁ)ntu bittuva bedegaṇagilu nāghaṁḍugabhatta mūḍe 1 ke ha 15 yī bāḷi
nalu naḍava Akki voravevora dēhārakke nāgaṁḍugadalu mūḍe 7 haṁdaṭinalu
mane maneya bāgila gadde [U]ddina gadde bittuva mūḍe 3 mūḍe tōṭada bāḷu bittuva mūḍe 4
A(ṁ)ntu bittuva mūḍe 7 mūḍe bāḷiṁda Akki mūḍe 12 Arsina baccala baḍagaṇa gadde
ya bayalu bittuva mūḍe 5 yiṁ Akki mūḍe 12 kāhāḍeyalu vōṇi
ya bāgilagaddeyiṁda Akki mūḍe 6 . guḷiyagaddeyiṁda Akki mūḍe 37 ke hāḍiya bā
ḷiṁda maṇigāṟakēriya Oḷagaṇa śrīsōmanāthadēvara Amruttapaḍige hā ne 30 lekkadaThe rest of the inscription is completely damaged.
Digital edition of SII 7.363 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
